(DEVICE FILE: RTL8211F-CG_QFN40_0R4_5X5_RTL82)

PINCOUNT 41

      MDIN1 MDIN2 MDIN3 MDIO MDIP0 MDIP1 MDIP2 MDIP3 PHYRSTB REG_OUT RSET RXC/PHYAD1 RXCTL/PHYAD2,
      RXD0/RXDLY RXD1/TXDLY RXD2/PLLOFF RXD3/PHYAD0 TXC TXCTL TXD0 TXD1 TXD2 TXD3 XTAL_IN,
      XTAL_OUT/EXT_CLK
PINUSE 'RTL8211F-CG_QFN40_0R4_5X5_RTL82' POWER POWER POWER POWER POWER UNSPEC POWER POWER UNSPEC,
      UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC,
      UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC,
      UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC UNSPEC
